name: financial
when_to_use: 需要零依赖且对齐 numpy-financial 语义的贷款、净现值或收益率计算核时用它而非手写,因为原生在 IRR 收敛、付款时点和现金流符号约定上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认会临时写 PMT 公式或脆弱的牛顿迭代,做不到稳定处理零利率、初期/末期付款、无正负混合现金流与不收敛返回值;financial 将这些边界收进测试过的纯函数。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written code when you need a zero-dependency calculation core for loans, net present value, or rate of return with numpy-financial semantics, because native implementations fail at IRR convergence, payment timing, and cash-flow sign conventions.
en.why_valuable: AI normally writes an ad hoc PMT formula or a fragile Newton iteration; it cannot reliably handle zero rates, beginning/end payments, cash flows without both signs, and non-convergence return values. financial puts these edge cases into tested pure functions.

data_in.note: kind selects one narrowed native signature; rate is a per-period decimal, due maps to PaymentDueTime.Begin/End, and cash flows are ordered by time.

irr.cashflows: number[] -- must contain both positive and negative values

npv.cashflows: number[] -- item 0 occurs at the present time; an empty array returns 0

data_in.note: kind 选择一条裁剪后的原生签名;rate 是每期小数,due 映射到 PaymentDueTime.Begin/End,现金流按时间顺序排列。

irr.cashflows: number[] —— 必须同时含正值和负值

npv.cashflows: number[] —— 第 0 项发生在当前时点;空数组结果为 0

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;零依赖纯 JS/TypeScript 财务计算核。
provides.outputs: pmt/npv 的 number,或 irr 的 number|NaN；NaN 表示符号条件不满足或迭代未收敛,消费方必须显式处理。

peer.note: 本条只产数值;金额展示交给 currency-js,高精度逐期账本可在调用边界另配 decimal-js。

boot.note: IRR 不收敛或现金流没有正负混合时返回 NaN;必须用 Number.isFinite(result) 校验,不要把 NaN 当 0。

isolation.evidence: dist/index.d.ts exposes only pure math functions (pmt/irr/npv/fv/pv/rate/mirr/ipmt/ppmt/nper) returning number; package has zero DOM/CSS/event surface — runs identically in any context including shadow.
